login.title: Log in to nvelope
login.description: Welcome back. Sign in to your workspaces.
login.invalidCredentials: That email and password do not match.
login.emailNotVerified: Verify your email address before signing in. Check your inbox for the verification link.
login.resendSent: If that address has an unverified account, a new verification link is on its way.

signup.title: Create your nvelope account
signup.description: Sign up, then create your first workspace.
signup.name: Name
signup.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
signup.emailDomainNotAllowed: Registration is not open to this email domain.
signup.checkInboxDescription: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
signup.checkInboxHint: Open the link in that email to activate your account, then sign in.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email address is confirmed. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerifiedDescription: This account has already been verified. You can sign in.
verifyEmail.invalidDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing its token.
verifyEmail.resendSent: If that address has an unverified account, a new verification link is on its way.

invite.invalidDescription: This invitation has expired, been revoked, or already been used.
invite.joinDescription: You were invited as {{email}}. Create your account to join.
invite.name: Your name
invite.haveAccountHint: Already have an account? Log in first, then open this link again.
